meaning: v.炖,焖,受闷热n.炖肉(或菜),闷热,拥挤,鱼塘,人工养蚝场
examples: Pete gobbled all the beef stew.
She served him a bowl of beef stew.
The meat needs to stew for two hours.
They've always been part of the great American stew of language, food, music and hard work.
Predictably, they ate rabbit stew, which their hostess had prepared with an expert hand.
